title: Overcoming the challenges of public policy-making for maintaining the supply of public goods from High Nature Value (HNV) farmland in Bulgaria
description: A practice abstract presenting a case study of the Western Stara Planina region in Bulgaria that evaluates public policy approaches to sustain biodiversity-related public goods from High Nature Value farmland. It highlights challenges and emphasizes the need for integrated, innovative EU-funded rural development measures to ensure the socio-economic viability and environmental conservation of traditional farming systems.
